name: Routine Consult
description: General-purpose veterinary consultation form — small animal.
overall_prompt: Capture the consult: presenting complaint, history, exam findings, assessment, plan, follow-up.

fields.title: Presenting complaint
fields.ai_prompt: Owner's chief concern in their words.

fields.title: Weight (kg)
fields.ai_prompt: Most recent weight if mentioned in transcript.

fields.title: Discharge instructions
fields.ai_prompt: Owner-facing instructions for home care, monitoring, follow-up.

name: Vaccination
description: Vaccination visit record — captures product, batch, route, site.

name: Surgical Discharge
description: Post-surgery discharge — anaesthetic, procedure, recovery, instructions.

fields.title: Anaesthetic monitoring summary
fields.ai_prompt: Vitals trends during anaesthesia (HR, BP, SpO2, ETCO2).

fields.title: Pain score at discharge
fields.ai_prompt: Score from observation in recovery. Use FLACC (animal observational scale).

fields.title: Take-home medications
fields.ai_prompt: Drug, dose, frequency, duration, owner instructions.

name: Euthanasia
description: Owner consent + procedure record for euthanasia. Uses system widgets so the consent record + controlled-drug ledger entry are created automatically on note submit (drug op stays pending until vet confirms).

fields.title: Reason for euthanasia
fields.ai_prompt: Quality-of-life assessment, refractory disease, owner decision.

fields.title: Owner consent
fields.ai_prompt: Verbal or written consent — irreversibility was acknowledged. Witness (vet nurse) co-signs per NZVA / AVA / BVA practice templates.

fields.title: Pre-euthanasia sedation
fields.ai_prompt: Sedative drug given before euthanasia (e.g. medetomidine, butorphanol).

fields.title: Euthanasia agent
fields.ai_prompt: Controlled-drug administration (typically pentobarbitone IV). Witness required.

fields.title: Time of death (confirmed)
fields.ai_prompt: Time and method of confirmation (auscultation, no corneal reflex).
